Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once I start reading, I, uh... s-sometimes have a difficult time stopping...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}This was the only place I could think of where we can relax without having to spend much money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11450 0 0}But, um... now that I think about it, maybe this place wasn't such a good idea...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}There's not much point in meeting up if we're both just going to read on our own, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11445 0 0}S-Sorry! I-I didn't mean to waste your day off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I-I'll think of something better next ti— Wait! I didn't mean to assume that, um... I-I just... Uh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro seems flustered.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11484 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Oh! I-I'm glad! I was worried I was the only one having fun...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}But I'll come here alone from now on. When I'm with you, I... want to have time to talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro is blushing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11475 0 0}{f 5 13 9 30 109}"Next time"? S-So you mean, um... you'd want to meet like this again...? Oh, I, uh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 4 23 0 109 3 25 25}S-Sorry, I'm being kind of presumptuous, aren't I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro seems excited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11465 0 0}Oh, look at the time... Days off always seem to go by so quickly, don't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... W-Would it be okay if I walked with you back to your dorm...? Part of the way?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro and I walked together and[n]parted ways as I neared the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
